svg.title: ADAM // COMMAND CENTER — MISSION CONTROL '76
svg.desc: A 1970s NASA/NORAD green-phosphor mission control CRT: a rotating wireframe globe with a terminator sweep and great-circle travel arcs to Bangkok, Tokyo and Seattle, a sweeping radar line and orbiting satellite blip, multi-city clocks, oscilloscope waveforms, station panels with live data, a scrolling telemetry log, and a marching crew of little green guys along a status rail.

g.text: CREW STATUS · SHIFT A · ALL HANDS NOMINAL
